channel.title: Daily Digest by Benjamin Ampel
channel.description: Daily curated reading at the intersection of cybersecurity, AI, research, and entrepreneurship. Curated by Benjamin Ampel.

item.title: Daily Digest #1 — June 22, 2026
item.dc:creator: Benjamin Ampel
item.description: North Korean Sapphire Sleet poisons 140+ npm packages, AryStinger botnet builds 4,300-router proxy network, and LLM safety geometry research surfaces a single linear direction separating safe from unsafe concepts.
